title: webhook — kill switches + rollout controls
description: Pennant flags. Kill switches default ON.

flags.description: Master outbound dispatch kill switch. Off = DispatchWebhookJob short-circuits with deliveries marked cancelled. Emergency ops toggle.
Inbound receiver processing kill switch. When off, /webhooks/inbound/* responds 200 (to prevent provider retries) but skips downstream event dispatch. Used during ingestion incidents.
Disable EventBridge deliveries during AWS outages. Deliveries defer via retry backoff.
Auto-disable subscriptions receiving 410 Gone. Off during migration windows where 410 is expected.
Wrap fan-out in Bus::batch. Off = individual per-subscription jobs (loses Horizon batch view but survives Bus::batch driver incompatibility).
Enforce per-subscription rate_limit_per_minute. Off during recovery from a backlog when we WANT to fire hoses.
Emit X-Webhook-Signature-Previous during rotation grace window. Off would break subscribers mid-rotation — emergency only.
Scheduled health probe. Off during massive-subscription-count events to avoid burst load.
